name: Canlis
reason: Seattle's most celebrated restaurant with private dining rooms and stunning lake views — perfect for milestone celebrations.

name: Pike Place Chowder
reason: Award-winning chowder in Pike Place Market — casual, quick, and a quintessential Seattle experience.

name: Stateside
reason: Creative fusion cuisine with shareable plates and a hip Capitol Hill atmosphere great for group dining.

name: The Walrus and the Carpenter
reason: Intimate oyster bar in Ballard with communal seating that naturally brings teams together over shared platters.

name: Din Tai Fung
reason: World-famous soup dumplings with large group tables — a fun shared eating experience everyone enjoys.

name: Salumi Artisan Cured Meats
reason: Legendary Pioneer Square deli with handcrafted sandwiches — perfect for a quick team lunch between sessions.

name: Japonessa
reason: Upscale sushi with creative rolls and a sleek atmosphere — great for an elevated team dinner.

name: Cafe Campagne
reason: Charming Pike Place bistro with prix fixe options that simplify group ordering and pacing.

name: Paseo
reason: Cult-favorite Caribbean sandwiches in Fremont — worth the trip for an unforgettable casual team lunch.

name: Bateau
reason: Farm-to-table whole animal dining with a communal chalkboard menu — creates a unique shared experience.

name: Revel
reason: Bold Korean-inspired shareable plates in Fremont — family-style service encourages team conversation.

name: Storyville Coffee
reason: Premium coffee with a cozy lounge space at Pike Place — ideal morning meeting spot with great pastries.

name: Omega Ouzeri
reason: Mezze-style shared plates encourage communal eating and trying new things together.

name: Tavolata
reason: Rustic Italian with long communal tables and family-style pasta — designed for group dining.

name: Matt's in the Market
reason: Pike Place gem with market-fresh ingredients and views — intimate enough for meaningful team conversations.
